source_pr.title: planner: Fix flaky TestGlobalStatsAndSQLBindingWithConcurrency
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #61901 

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

Disabled auto_analyze in test because it can accidentally break the test if auto analyze executes before the manual analyze. The test first requires plans to be chosen without statistics, and then later executes ANALYZE to test plans with statistics. Auto analyze can therefore disrupt this test and make it unpredictable.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: TestGlobalStatsAndSQLBindingWithConcurrency becomes flaky when auto-analyze runs before the test's manual ANALYZE, changing statistics and breaking plan assertions.
failure_signature: TestGlobalStatsAndSQLBindingWithConcurrency: plan assertions break when auto-analyze collects stats earlier than expected.
root_cause_explanation: The test asserts plan choices before/after manual ANALYZE. Auto-analyze can run in the background and collect stats earlier than the test expects, causing nondeterministic plan selection and flaky assertions. The PR stabilizes the test by turning off `@@global.tidb_enable_auto_analyze` during the test and resetting it afterward.
fix_pattern: Disable `@@global.tidb_enable_auto_analyze` during the test and reset it after, so background auto-analyze cannot change stats before the manual ANALYZE steps.
